title: Heredoc or nowdoc usage
summary: Heredoc-style string construction can make escaping analysis harder and is commonly discouraged in WordPress.org review workflows.

guidance.why_it_matters: This style can hide output construction and make escaping issues harder to review.
guidance.fix: Prefer explicit concatenation or templating patterns that keep escaping visible at output time.
guidance.false_positive_risk: Low to medium. Examples in docs or comments may be intentional.
